title: Deprecated instructions should be avoided
description: Deprecated instructions should not be usedAnalyze your codeconsistency-conventionalmaintainabilityCode SmellDeprecated instructions should be replaced by other suggested instructions.Why is this an issue?How can I fix it?More InfoLanguages and technologies evolve, which leads to deprecation of some features. At some day they may be removed. It is important to use up-to-date constructs to avoid issues by migration to newer version of technology.Available In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-premise CIAvailable Since10.3Analyze code in youron-premise CIDeveloper EditionAvailable Since10.3©2025SonarSource Sàrl.
recommendation: Remove the problematic code and refactor as needed.

checks.message: The MAINTAINER instruction is deprecated. Use LABEL maintainer="email@example.com" instead to specify the image maintainer.
